# Project Memory Journal — chip1

This file is the chronological, write-time-intelligence journal of conventions, decisions, and discoveries for the chip1 project family. Managed by `chip1/update-memory.sh`.

**Do not edit this file manually** — use `update-memory.sh` to ensure CRUD logic is applied.

---

## Active Decisions

| Date | Title | Author | Details |
|------|-------|--------|---------|
| 2026-05-27 | **PATCH mutations must forward diff.unset for cleared fields** | aduduk-altir (via PR #3925 review) | **Context:** In InvoiceLineDetailsForm.tsx, createDiff was called but diff.unset (fields the user clears, e.g. removing a date or blanking a field) was checked in the early-return guard but never sent to the API. The value appeared in diff.unset, not diff.changed, so it was silently dropped — user saw no error but the clear was never persisted.<br>**Pattern:** Always forward diff.unset alongside diff.changed: `{ ...diff.changed, ...(diff.unset?.length ? { unset: diff.unset } : {}) }`. The mutation payload type must also accept the `unset` key (string array of field paths). Without this, any field a user clears will be silently lost.<br><sup>Source: `apps/crm/src/features/InvoiceLineDetails/InvoiceLineDetailsTab/islands/InvoiceLineDetailsForm.tsx`</sup><br><sup>Docs: .claude/docs/architecture-patterns.md</sup> |
| 2026-05-27 | **Prevent useQuery from firing with empty-string IDs for optional relationships** | kpanchal-altir (via PR #4099) | **Context:** In StockDetailsIsland.tsx:50-53, when a stock has no PO line, `stock.poLine?.po?.poId ?? ""` passes empty-string IDs to `useQuery`, causing unnecessary API calls. The query fires with empty params even though the relationship is optional.<br>**Pattern:** When querying related entities through optional/conditional relationships, use the `enabled` option to prevent firing queries when IDs are absent. Never use `?? ""` (empty-string fallback) for query parameters that depend on optional nested relationships.<br><sup>Source: `apps/crm/src/features/StockDetails/StockDetailsTab/StockDetailsIsland.tsx`</sup><br><sup>Docs: .claude/docs/architecture-patterns.md</sup> |
| 2026-05-26 | **MC1 nav-link gates require both feature flag and permission check** |  | **Context:** Feature flag alone doesn't prevent tenant-level access. Permission endpoint alone doesn't prevent route registration.<br>**Pattern:** Use `requiresPageAccess` on TNavLink + `usePageAccess(path)` guard in page component. Both gates required. See `.claude/docs/app-specific-patterns.md`. |
| 2026-05-26 | **Namespace TS6 path aliases without baseUrl** |  | **Context:** TS6 deprecates baseUrl. Path aliases that relied on baseUrl are broken.<br>**Pattern:** Use explicit relative paths: `"@/*": ["./src/*"]`. No baseUrl. See `.claude/docs/ts6-conventions.md`. |
| 2026-05-26 | **Cross-app types live in @chip1/core/types/transactional.ts** |  | **Context:** User, contact, and part-attribute types redeclared in each app's types/common.ts, diverging over time.<br>**Pattern:** Import `TTransactionalAccountUser<R>`, `TTransactionalAccountContact`, `TCommonPartAttributes` from `@chip1/core/types/transactional`. See `.claude/docs/architecture-patterns.md`. |
| 2026-05-26 | **Shared infinite queries use factory pattern** |  | **Context:** Infinite-scroll list queries duplicated across apps with different service instances.<br>**Pattern:** Export factory from `@chip1/core/features/<domain>/`. Apps call with own service function. Export `<DOMAIN>_LIST_BASE_KEY` for cache invalidation. See `.claude/docs/architecture-patterns.md`. |
| 2026-05-26 | **Shared API domains use factory pattern in @chip1/core** |  | **Context:** API logic duplicated across apps when a domain must be used by CRM and myChip1.<br>**Pattern:** Implement as factory in `packages/core/api/<domain>.ts` accepting interceptors. Each app instantiates and re-exports. See `.claude/docs/architecture-patterns.md`. |
| 2026-05-26 | **VM functions receive whole objects, not destructured fields** |  | **Context:** Destructuring at call sites couples callers to VM function internals; adding fields requires updating all call sites.<br>**Pattern:** Pass the whole entity to VM functions: `toShipmentVm(shipment)` not `toShipmentVm({ id, name, status })`. See `.claude/docs/code-redundancy.md`. |
| 2026-05-26 | **Validation schema defaults replace manual initialValues fallbacks** |  | **Context:** FormikForm casts initialValues through Yup schema. Schema defaults (`.default('')`, `.default(null)`) apply automatically.<br>**Pattern:** Pass entities directly to initialValues — schema handles the rest. No manual null/empty fallbacks. See `.claude/docs/code-redundancy.md`. |
| 2026-05-26 | **Filter store defaults omit explicit nulls** |  | **Context:** Explicit nulls for every field add noise and are redundant — undefined and null are equivalent for Zustand stores.<br>**Pattern:** Only specify non-null defaults: `const DEFAULT_FILTER: TFilter = { isActive: true }`. See `.claude/docs/filter-system.md` and `.claude/docs/code-redundancy.md`. |
| 2026-05-26 | **Filters use createFilterBarWrapper at module scope** |  | **Context:** Filter wrappers created during render cause unstable hook references and re-renders.<br>**Pattern:** Use `createFilterBarWrapper(useFilterHook)` at module level. For dynamic filter hooks, create separate stable wrapper components. See `.claude/docs/filter-system.md`. |
| 2026-05-26 | **Table loading uses initial skeleton, not inline spinner** |  | **Context:** Inline spinners during initial table load look broken. Route-level Suspense was inconsistent.<br>**Pattern:** Use `useShouldShowInitialTableSkeleton(query)` with `MuiTableSkeleton` on initial load. Don't replace rendered data with skeleton during refetches. See `.claude/docs/table-loading-patterns.md`. |
| 2026-05-26 | **Selection-dependent actions in SelectionActionBar, not FAB** |  | **Context:** Selection-dependent FAB items have discoverability problems, disabled-state confusion, and cross-tab leakage.<br>**Pattern:** Move selection-dependent actions to `<SelectionActionBar />` (table footer overlay). Gate tab-specific actions by mounting in the tab, not by checking pathname. See `.claude/docs/selection-action-bar.md`. |
| 2026-05-26 | **Persistent sorting uses bindSortProvider** |  | <sup>Superseded by: Use entity-specific sort storage keys</sup><br>**Context:** Duplicated sort-state management across list pages with no persistence.<br>**Pattern:** Use `bindSortProvider<TSortEnum>(storageKey, defaultSort)` with unique storage keys per entity. See `.claude/docs/architecture-patterns.md`. |
| 2026-05-26 | **Zustand context stores use createZustandContext** |  | **Context:** Raw React Context + Zustand requires manual boilerplate for provider, hook typing, and dependency tracking.<br>**Pattern:** Use `createZustandContext` from `@chip1/utils/zustandContext`. Provider accepts `createStore` + optional `dependencies`. See `.claude/docs/architecture-patterns.md`. |
| 2026-05-26 | **PATCH write-only fields passed outside diff** |  | <sup>Supersedes: PATCH mutations must use createDiff</sup><br>**Context:** Fields like `timelineNote` and `reason` are write-only (not returned by server). Putting them inside the diff causes data-loss since they're absent in original.<br>**Pattern:** Pass write-only fields outside createDiff: `{ ...diff.changed, ...(reason ? { reason } : {}) }`. See `.claude/docs/architecture-patterns.md`. |
| 2026-05-26 | **PATCH mutations must use createDiff** |  | **Context:** Sending full objects in PATCH causes backend validations on unrelated field groups.<br>**Pattern:** Use `createDiff` from `@chip1/utils/helpers/diffPatch` to compute minimal diffs. Skip mutation when nothing changed. See `.claude/docs/architecture-patterns.md`. |
| 2026-05-26 | **FormikForm defaults to enableReinitialize=false** |  | **Context:** React Query refetches return new object references. enableReinitialize=true causes Formik to silently discard user edits.<br>**Pattern:** Key the component on entity ID instead: `<FormikForm key={entity.id} initialValues={...} />`. See `.claude/docs/formik-patterns.md`. |
| 2026-05-26 | **Formik cascading via async onChange over useEffect** |  | **Context:** useEffect with query-derived deps re-fires on every React Query background refetch, silently overwriting user edits in forms that are open for 5-10 minutes.<br>**Pattern:** Use async onChange handlers with `ensureSafeQueryData` from `@chip1/utils/safeQueryClient` for cascading fields. Include a stale-response guard with useRef. Never use useEffect for cascading. See `.claude/docs/formik-patterns.md`. |
| 2026-05-26 | **Adopt `getSimpleCells` for table column definitions** |  | **Context:** Raw `TableCell` / `SingleLineCell` usage requires manual dash fallback, cssVarId wiring, and flex layout. Repeated boilerplate in every columnsDefs file.<br>**Pattern:** Use `getSimpleCells<TRow>()` from `@chip1/components/table/getSimpleCells` for all plain data cells. Declare at module scope. See `.claude/docs/simple-cells.md`. |

---

## Archived Decisions

| Date | Title | Author | Archived by | Details |
|------|-------|--------|-------------|---------|
| 2026-05-27 | **Always run pnpm check:typescript before committing** |  |  | **Context:** Type errors must be caught before commit<br>**Pattern:** Run pnpm check:typescript before every commit |
